field.label: Enable Defguard Gateway
field.help: Check to enable Defguard Gateway service.

field.label: Log level
field.help: Set the application log level used when syslog is disabled.

field.label: Gateway name
field.help: Name that will be displayed in Defguard.

field.label: Gateway gRPC port
field.help: Port used by the gateway gRPC server.

field.label: Use syslog
field.help: Enable logging to syslog.

field.label: PID file
field.help: Optional: write PID to this file.

field.label: Syslog socket
field.help: Specify the syslog socket.

field.label: Syslog facility
field.help: Specify the syslog facility.

field.label: Network interface
field.help: Specify the WireGuard interface name. It must start with wg.

field.label: Stats gathering period
field.help: Specify how often interface statistics are sent, in seconds.

field.label: Use WireGuard userspace implementation
field.help: Use userspace WireGuard implementation; useful on systems without native WireGuard support.

field.label: Pre up
field.help: Command to run before bringing up the interface.

field.label: Pre down
field.help: Command to run before bringing down the interface.

field.label: Post up
field.help: Command to run after bringing up the interface.

field.label: Post down
field.help: Command to run after bringing down the interface.

field.label: Health port
field.help: Optional HTTP port exposing the gateway health endpoint.

field.label: Enable masquerade
field.help: Automatically apply outbound masquerading rules in the firewall.

field.label: Firewall priority
field.help: Optional priority for the Defguard forward chain.

field.label: Disable firewall management
field.help: Disable Defguard-managed firewall changes for incompatible hardware or custom setups.

field.label: HTTP bind address
field.help: Optional IPv4 or IPv6 address used by the health endpoint.

field.label: Certificate directory
field.help: Directory where the gateway stores generated gRPC certificates.
